channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sofia Goggia earns her 4th downhill win in Cortina while Lindsey Vonn places 20th
item.description: CORTINA D'AMPEZZO, Italy (AP) — Sofia Goggia solidified her status as the favorite for another downhill gold by winning Saturday for the fourth time on the course for next year’s Olympics.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: California pals Tien, 19, and Michelsen, 20, are 2 of 4 US men in the Australian Open's 4th round
item.description: Two friends from California, Learner Tien and Alex Michelsen, have both reached the fourth round at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Sources: Texans guard Shaq Mason back from Grade 2 sprained knee, back in starting lineup in playoff game at Chiefs
item.description: Texans veteran offensive lineman Shaq Mason returns to the starting lineup Saturday in playoff game against the Kansas City Chiefs
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: Wife-and-husband duo Elina Svitolina and Gael Monfils win on the same court at the Australian Open
item.description: Gael Monfils has joined Roger Federer as the only men to reach the Australian Open’s fourth round at age 38 or older since the tournament field expanded to 128 players in 1988.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jimmy Butler returns from suspension, plays Friday for Miami against Denver
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler walked out of the Miami Heat locker room on Friday night wearing a Michael Jordan jersey. It wasn't a No. 23 jersey. It was a No. 45 — the one Jordan briefly wore when he returned to the Chicago Bulls after coming out of retirement in March 1995.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Breanna Stewart scores first basket in Unrivaled history in debut of 3-on-3 women's league
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unrivaled shined brightly on its opening night. The 3-on-3 women’s basketball league co-founded by WNBA stars Breanna Stewart and Napheesa Collier debuted Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah Valley wins on overtime buzzer-beater, 85-83
item.description: ARLINGTON, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Texas native Kylin Green went the full length of the floor in five seconds and dished to Jackson Holcombe, who scored in the final second of overtime to lift Utah Valley to a thrilling 85-83 road victory over UT Arlington on Thursday night at College Park Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah's struggles at home continue with 5-3 loss to Rangers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club are having a difficult time during its longest homestand of the season. The New York Rangers scored three goals in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-3 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes earn first Big 12 road win, beating TCU 73-65
item.description: FORT WORTH, Tex. (AP) - After getting its first Big 12 Conference win on Saturday, the Runnin' Utes now have their first Big 12 winning streak. Gabe Madsen scored 17 points, Keanu Dawes added 16 and Utah never trailed in a 73-65 victory over TCU on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ty Allred's insane buzzer-beater lifts CMU over Western Colorado
item.description:
Despite great defense from the Mountaineer defender, Allred stepped back and threw up a prayer for the win.
His prayer was answered.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Montreal skates past Utah Hockey Club, 5-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club's season-long 7-game homestand is not going well. Utah lose for the third time in four games at the Delta Center, falling to the Montreal Canadians Tuesday night, 5-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Murphy and Williamson carry the Pelicans to a 119-113 win over the Bulls
item.description: Trey Murphy III scored 32 points and Zion Williamson added 21 as the New Orleans Pelicans beat the Chicago Bulls 119-113 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs' 2024 first-round pick reflects on rookie year
item.description: Rookie center Graham Barton has taken the NFL by storm and reflected on his first year in the league.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Young Broncos should be proud of 10-win season
item.description: No one will ever be thrilled about losing a playoff game by 24 points, and the Broncos certainly aren't, but it's incredible how greatly Denver exceeded expectations this season.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Patrick and Brittany Mahomes welcome third child
item.description: Brittany Mahomes gave birth to the couple’s third child, a girl named Golden Raye Mahomes, on Jan. 12, the couple announced on social media.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: New England hires former Patriots Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as coach
item.description: The New England Patriots have hired Mike Vrabel as their head coach. The team announced the hiring Sunday morning, a week after Patriots owner Robert Kraft fired Jerod Mayo following the team’s season-ending victory over the Buffalo Bills. Mayo finished 4-13 in his lone season.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: New England Patriots hire former Super Bowl champ Mike Vrabel as next coach; Bears had interviewed him
item.description: Vrabel, a fan favorite during eight seasons as a player in New England where he was a member of its first three Super Bowl winners and an inductee into the team’s Hall of Fame in 2023, was the preferred candidate because of his long association with the franchise and coaching success.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Clear skies and clear minds: Rams regroup in Arizona to prepare for playoff game vs. Vikings
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Everything seemed pretty normal for the Los Angeles Rams during Saturday's practice at their temporary home on a beautiful afternoon in suburban Phoenix.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC loses on late goal to Islanders, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Mathew Barzal scored with 1:25 left in regulation and the New York Islanders defeated the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Saturday. The forward found a rebound off a scrum in front of the net and lifted it over a sprawling Connor Ingram from the right circle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
